About Organization

The Uttar Pradesh Basic Education Department is responsible for the education sector in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India.

For more information, please visit the official website of the Uttar Pradesh Basic Education Department.


About the Programme

The UP Jaunpur ECCE Educator Recruitment 2026 is an outsourcing recruitment programme for 220 posts of ECCE Educators in the Uttar Pradesh Basic Education Department.

The programme aims to provide employment opportunities to eligible candidates in the education sector in Uttar Pradesh, India.
